defs: The act of gainsaying, refusing, or disowning; negation; -- the contrary of affirmation.
quotes: You ought to converse with so much sincerity that your bare affirmation or denial may be sufficient.

defs: A refusal to admit the truth of a statement, charge, imputation, etc.; assertion of the untruth of a thing stated or maintained; a contradiction.
A refusal to grant; rejection of a request.
quotes: The commissioners, . . . to obtain from the king's subjects as much as they would willingly give, . . . had not to complain of many peremptory denials.

defs: A refusal to acknowledge; disclaimer of connection with; disavowal; -- the contrary of confession; as, the denial of a fault charged on one; a denial of God.
